Title: ATAC MP; Mus musculus; ATAC-seq
Attributes: source_name: FACS sorted T+/Noto-/Foxa2- from caudal ends of TS12/TS13 embryos obtained from tatraploid complementation of embryonic stem cellstissue: FACS sorted T+/Noto-/Foxa2- from caudal ends of TS12/TS13 embryos obtained from tatraploid complementation of embryonic stem cellscell line: genetically modified F1G4 (C57BL/6N x SV129) mES cellscell type: mesodermal progenitorsgenotype: T::H2B-Venus (BAC), Noto::H2B-mCherry (BAC), Foxa2::H2B-mTurquoise (BAC)treatment: In order to obtain single cell suspensions from embryo tissue for FACS sorting, 10ul of 5% BSA in PBS was added to the pooled samples and 100ul of ice-cold 0.05% trypsin was added. A homogenous suspension was achieved by slow pipetting and the reaction was stopped with the addition of 200ul of 5% BSA in PBS. Before cell sorting on a FACS Aria II (Becton Dickinson), the cell suspension was filtered through a 35µm mesh. Cells were sorted into FACS-tubes containing 5% BSA in PBS, which had previously been rotating for several hours to pre-coat the tube walls with BSA. Sorted cells were centrifuged at 1000rpm and 4°C for 10 minutes, transferred to Eppendorf tubes containing PBS with 0.05% Triton X-100 and centrifuged at 1000rpm and 4°C for 10 minutes. The supernatant was removed and cells were directly processed for ATAC-Seq.geo_loc_name: missingcollection_date: missing
